question: Identify the root cause of the network fault: which device, what changed, and why it breaks.
description:
R2 removes `redistribute connected` from its BGP IPv4 unicast AF. The
iBGP session to R4 stays Up, but R2 no longer injects its directly-
connected prefixes (192.0.0.0/30 R2-R0 customer link, 192.0.0.8/30
R2-R3 core link, 192.0.2.2/32 Loopback0) into BGP. R4's BGP table
loses these prefixes. Subtle silent failure — no adjacency drop, no
syslog; PE-A's customer reachability silently disappears.
expected_rca:
Root cause: on 100.64.0.102 (R2), redistribute connected was removed from the BGP IPv4 unicast address-family.
redistribute connected is what sources R2's directly-connected prefixes into BGP; with it gone, R2 stops injecting those prefixes (192.0.0.0/30, 192.0.0.8/30, Loopback0 192.0.2.2/32) into the IPv4 unicast AF, so the iBGP session to R4 carries no advertisement for them and R4 never learns them, leaving PE-A's customer prefixes unreachable across the core.
Fix: restore redistribute connected under R2's BGP IPv4 unicast AF.
expected_symptoms_summary:
No fault syslog observed after apply — silent scenario; the iBGP
session stays Established and the breakage is "what's redistributed".
Diagnostic ground truth lives in expected_state_diffs.
expected_state_diffs: R2 `show running-config router bgp 100 address-family ipv4 unicast`: no `redistribute connected` line (baseline: present).
Diff vs R4 `show running-config router bgp 100 address-family ipv4 unicast`: R4 still has `redistribute connected`. R2/R4 configs diverge only on this line.
R4 `show bgp ipv4 unicast`: prefixes 192.0.0.0/30 (R2-R0 link), 192.0.0.8/30 (R2-R3 link), 192.0.2.2/32 (R2 Loopback0) absent (baseline: present as `B 100 i` from neighbor 192.0.2.2).
R4 `show route 192.0.0.0/30`: Network not in table (baseline: via 192.0.2.2 BGP).
R4 `show bgp neighbor 192.0.2.2 | inc Prefix`: prefixes-received counter at 0 (baseline: 3 prefixes received from R2).

apply.commands:
configure terminal
router bgp 100
address-family ipv4 unicast
 no redistribute connected

revert.commands:
configure terminal
router bgp 100
address-family ipv4 unicast
 redistribute connected
